the cause of a good result. Astrologers do come across various
types of natives with different nature and of different
temperaments.
RESULTS OF ASTROLOGICAL ADVICE
Many natives who are deceived in the course of life for
various reasons, approach the astrologer with great desperation
and annoyance. First, the astrologer tries to find out the
circumstances under which the native is approaching him definite
solutions for the problems, so that the native may get rid of his
desperation. Some women literally shed tears while explaining
their situations. In such cases, the astrologer will have to offer
such suggestions and solutions, that do not cause any threat or
damage to their minds. This is very important for an astrologer.
HOW TO SUGGEST SOLUTIONS?
